title: Glorious Golden Venezuelan Chicken Skewers
description: A light and energizing Venezuelan dish featuring chicken skewers cooked to perfection with a hint of wine and cream, served on a hot stone plate. This recipe combines the flavors of Venezuela with the technique of wok-hei for a unique taste experience.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together white wine, heavy cream, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, heat a hot stone plate in the oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Once the chicken is cooked, place the skewers on the hot stone plate and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve with your choice of sides.
